codeReview.summary: The fix addresses the prior blocking scrutiny finding. The dashboard now reloads DB-first stored history after either newly analyzed matches or stale-only refreshes, and the bridge/API path propagates tracked recent_match_window metadata so reconciliation is driven by persisted freshness state instead of a hardcoded dashboard window. The handoff's live evidence also closes the earlier proof gap by showing pre-sync stored history, missing live Riot IDs, post-sync stored-history reread with those IDs surfaced at the head, and a duplicate-free top page.

summary: Reviewed the fix feature metadata, prior failed review, handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, and commit d83513d. The implementation and recorded live evidence now prove the DB-first reread/backfill behavior required for returning-player reconciliation, so this fix passes and addresses the earlier fail review for returning-player-recent-reconciliation.
